title: The State of U.S. Science and Engineering 2026
summary_en: The past quarter century has reshaped the U.S. science and engineering enterprise through the business sector’s dominant role in funding and performing research and development (R&D), the concentration of innovation activity in information technologies and critical and emerging technology areas, and the rise of China as a competitor and R&D performer. The United States maintains comparative advantages in highly cited research and patents, venture capital–backed innovation, and high-technology se
title_cn: 美国发布《2026年美国科学与工程状况》报告
summary_cn: 美国国家科学委员会依据《美国法典》第42编第1863条j款第1项及《国家科学基金会法》相关法定要求，每双数年编制两年一度的《科学与工程指标》报告并报送美国总统和国会。本次正式发布的《2026年美国科学与工程状况》为该系列最新成果，由美国国家科学基金会下属国家科学与工程统计中心在国家科学委员会指导下完成编制。

title: Federal Funds for Research and Development: Fiscal Years 2024–25
summary_en: This set of data tables presents data on the research and development (R&D) outlays and obligations of federal agencies. Outlays are provided by agency for total R&D and total R&D plant. Obligations are provided for R&D by agency for type of work (basic research, applied research, and experimental development), field of R&D (for basic research, applied research, and experimental development), type of performer, and geographic area. Obligations are provided for R&D plant by agency for type of per
title_cn: 美国发布2024—2025财年联邦研发资金调查有关工作信息
summary_cn: 近期，美国国家科学基金会下属国家科学与工程统计中心发布第74卷《2024—2025财年联邦研发资金》调查相关工作信息。该调查为年度普查类调查，统计对象为开展研发项目的联邦机构，是美国获取联邦研发经费相关信息的主要渠道。

title: Federal R&D Obligations Increased 4.4% in FY 2024; Most Agencies Estimate Declines in FY 2025
summary_en: Federal obligations for research and experimental development saw an increase of 4.4% from FY 2023 to FY 2024. However, although preliminary federal agency obligations for FY 2025 indicate most federal agencies will see declining R&D obligations in FY 2025 the total is estimated to decrease by 0.1%. These data are from the latest edition of the Survey of Federal Funds for Research and Development, sponsored by the National Center for Science and Engineering Statistics within the U.S. National Sc
title_cn: 美国2024财年联邦研发拨款义务额增长4.4% 2025财年多数机构预计该项额度下降
summary_cn: 近日，美国国家科学基金会下属国家科学与工程统计中心发布《联邦研发资金调查》最新数据，公布该国2024财年联邦研发拨款义务执行情况及2025财年初步测算结果。
